prompt: I'm worried that recent edge-handling changes may have regressed curved edges. Verify that the undirected polyline examples (test/undirected/polylines.gv.txt and test/undirected/polylines_curved.gv.txt) still convert well.
assertions: Both polylines.gv.txt and polylines_curved.gv.txt were rendered and checked (not just one of them)
Produced graphviz reference PNGs and converted draw.io PNGs for the checked files (image files present in outputs)
Conclusions are based on visual comparison of rendered images, not solely XML/code analysis
Report states a clear per-file conclusion about edge routing/curvature fidelity, naming specific observations
